devicefarm.networkprofile.Description.Docs: The description of the network profile.

devicefarm.networkprofile.DownlinkBandwi.Docs: The data throughput rate in bits per second, as an integer from 0 to 104857600.

devicefarm.networkprofile.DownlinkDelayM.Docs: Delay time for all packets to destination in milliseconds as an integer from 0 to 2000.

devicefarm.networkprofile.DownlinkJitter.Docs: Time variation in the delay of received packets in milliseconds as an integer from 0 to 2000.

devicefarm.networkprofile.DownlinkLossPe.Docs: Proportion of received packets that fail to arrive from 0 to 100 percent.

devicefarm.networkprofile.Name.Docs: The name of the network profile.

devicefarm.networkprofile.ProjectArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the specified project.

devicefarm.networkprofile.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html) in the *AWS CloudFormation resource type reference guide*.

devicefarm.networkprofile.UplinkBandwidt.Docs: The data throughput rate in bits per second, as an integer from 0 to 104857600.

devicefarm.networkprofile.UplinkDelayMs.Docs: Delay time for all packets to destination in milliseconds as an integer from 0 to 2000.

devicefarm.networkprofile.UplinkJitterMs.Docs: Time variation in the delay of received packets in milliseconds as an integer from 0 to 2000.

devicefarm.networkprofile.UplinkLossPerc.Docs: Proportion of transmitted packets that fail to arrive from 0 to 100 percent.
